In-page audit lite

Stealth Lightbeacon

Overview, connection, results, and settings at a glance.

Idle

Local backend settings

Configure a local or remote backend before rescanning. Stdin mode is useful for direct Python adapters.

Open OpenAPI spec
Scan state will appear here.
Popup shell loaded outside the extension runtime. The interactive UI can still be validated in a browser, but scan actions require the extension environment.
Local-only default. The rescan flow uses the active tab plus the background service worker.

Panel settings

Tune colors, hide optional sections, and report bugs without leaving the popup.

Appearance

Hex colors only. Changes save locally in the extension.

The theme editor is a responsive grid so it stays usable on narrow popup widths.

Visible sections

Accessibility profile

Report a bug

Send a short repro and the active page URL to pratik.saptarshi@outlook.com.

Report a bug by email
